prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SLUICEBOXKIT-17PC-ALUM Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 16pc Beginner Gold Panning Sluice Box Kit for Adults Starting to Pan for Gold with Classifier Screens Description: The ASR Outdoor Sluice Box Gold Panning Prospecting Kit comes with everything you'll need to pan for gold anywhere, anytime.

The backbone of this kit is made up of the ASR Outdoor Backpack Folding Sluice Box for Gold Panning features a 3-piece folding design and a 50-inch gravity fed channel, together creating this high recovery gold panning and mineral collection tool. In addition, the gold prospecting sluice box is easily portable, folding down in size by simply loosening the connecting wing nuts. The sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place when the sluice is unfolded; This takes care of the most common complaint about some models that often fold up when you tried to pick them up out of the stream.

This lightweight, aluminum folding sluice box incorporates traditional tried and true design aspects in an elongated 50" run out. What makes this unit different and extra handy is the ability to fold up to just 15 inches tall by 12 inches wide, easily fitting into a backpack or 5 gallon bucket that is ideal for all day hikers, adventurers and seasoned miner 49ers. You can backpack this folding sluice into remote areas anywhere. Plus, the gold panning sluice box carry strap is removable and adjustable, extending to 54 inches so that it can be used as either a hand carry strap or shoulder strap. Notably, this allows the carry strap to be easily removed when the sluice is in action. The body of the sluice box is made of rust-resistant aluminum, allowing to use this gold panning sluice box for many gold recovery seasons to come.

The sluice riffles feature Uni-Body construction, the riffles are precision laser cut from a single piece of 18 gauge steel and then formed into ultra light, sturdy steel riffles. These are then zinc plated for long rust-free service Search Terms: gold panning prospecting sifting tools sluice box classifier screen set gem collecting hock hounding adventure mineral collection outdoor gifts for dad Features: - COMPLETE GOLD PANNING KIT: Includes all the tools needed to strike it rich in the great outdoors. Everything comes out of the box, ready to deploy gold mining equipment - GOLD PAN & CLASSIFIER SCREEN: 14" & 10" Gold Pans; 1/20", 1/8" Sifting Classifier Screens Fit on top of a 5 Gallon Bucket - PROSPECTING CLEAN UP ACCESSORIES: 5oz Snifter Bottle & Magnifying Tweezers to Pick Up Minerals; Comes with (3) 2 Dram Glass Vials to Collect & Store Minerals & Gems - PAY DIRT SCOOP: Heavy Duty 12.5" Scoop Digs Through Silt, Mud & Gravel Easily to Locate Minerals - HIGH-YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: The backbone of this kit is the Folding Sluice Box which features 18 Gauge steel zinc-plated riffles built throughout the sediment channel trapping gold flake and small gold nuggets in the woven vinyl miners moss which is pre-installed and ready to use out of the box === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 17pc Gold Panning Sluice Box Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: Folding Sluice Box, Classifier Screens, Gold Pans, Prospecting Tools, Portable Aluminum, Complete Beginner Set
